nasb.text: Oh that I had in the desert A wayfarers’ lodging place; That I might leave my people And go from them! For all of them are adulterers, An assembly of treacherous men.

esv.text: Oh that I had in the desert a travelers’ lodging place, that I might leave my people and go away from them! For they are all adulterers, a company of treacherous men.

cnv.text: 但願我在曠野有一個旅客住宿的地方， 好使我離開我的同胞， 可以離他們而去； 因為他們都是行姦淫的， 是行詭詐之徒。

ccb.text: 真希望我在旷野有栖身之处， 以便远离我的同胞， 因为他们是一群不忠不贞之徒。
